name: Blueberry Pear Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Pear halves in juice, undred
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pears and reserve 3/4 cup of liquid. Chop the pears and set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine 3 tablespoons sugar and cornstarch; stir well.
3. Stir in the reserved liquid and bring to a boil over medium heat.
4. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and gently stir in the chopped pears and blueberries.
5. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish coated with cooking spray.
6. In a medium bowl, combine flour, 1 tablespoon sugar, and baking powder; stir well.
7. Add milk, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened.
8. Drop the batter by tablespoonfuls over the fruit mixture.
9. Sprinkle with 2 teaspoons sugar.
10. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
